titleStmt.title: SII 7.206: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 206. (A.R. No. 36 of 1901). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīraṁ syādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jīyāttrailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ [. 1 .*] tribhuvanaśōbhā
nilayastribhuvanapaticaṁdranāthajinanilayaḥ . tribhuvanajanatāsukhadastribhuvanacūḍāmaṇirjjayatu . [2 .*] śrīmattauḷa
vadēśavaṁśapuradoḷvarddhiṣṇudharmmārtthasatkāmaśrīnilayarhalarttribhuvanīcūḍāmaṇikhyātamaṁ . svāmīṁduprabhadēvamaṁdira
manatyāścaryyamaṁ nirvvṛtiprēmarmmāḍisi lōkapūjyategavarnnōṁtarppeṟarṇnoṁtarē . [3 .*] halaranuvṛttiyiṁ tribhuvanai
ka śirōmaṇināma tanmahānilayaśirōmaṇitvapadadiṁ padedoppuUdaṁ tṛtīyamaṁ . nilayamanoldu panneraḍu
bhāgegaḷiṁdoḍagūḍi ramyatākulagṛhamāgi māḍisida bhavyara puṇyamanēna neṁbudo . [4 .*] svasti . śrīmadvaṁśapurada
yeṁṭuprajeseṭṭikāṟaru nālvaru yeḷamegaḷoḷagāda samastahalaru māḍisida tribhuvanacūḍāmaṇi mahācai
tyālayada mūṟeneya neleyanu paṁḍitadēvarugaḷa nirūpadiṁdalū halara Anumatiyiṁdalū hanneraḍu bhāge
gaḷāgi māḍisida bhavyajanaṁgaḷāreṁdoḍe . seṭṭiseṭṭiya baḷiya Āḷva kōṭēśvaraseṭṭiyarige bhāge 1 puḷḷiseṭṭiya ba
ḷiya [A]mēca maiṁdiseṭṭiya Aḷiyaṁdirige bhāge 1 Uḷḷiya varddhamānaseṭṭi Avara taṁma peduOla śāṁtiseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 2 Aṁtu bhā
ge mūṟu 3 bhāgyaṇaseṭṭi baḷiya nōṭada vikrāṁtaseṭṭiya Aḷiya koṇna nēmaṇnaseṭṭigu puḷḷiseṭṭiya
baḷiya baḍatuseṭṭiya Aḷiya Uḷḷiya brahmaṇaseṭṭi Avara Aḷiya bhaṁḍāri nēmaṇna seṭṭigaḷige bhāge Oṁdu 1 bhāgyaṇṇaseṭṭiya
baḷiya nano bālyaṁmaseṭṭiya Aḷiya Aḍḍaṇa bālyaṁmaseṭṭi bhaṁḍāri dēvaruseṭṭiya Aḷiya nāmābuseṭṭigaḷige bhāge 1
puḷḷiseṭṭiya baḷiya Āḷvadēsiṁgaseṭṭi sāmaṇi nēmiseṭṭigaḷige bhāge Oṁdu 1 puḷḷiseṭṭiya baḷiya seṁtaṇi dēvaruseṭṭiyara
Aḷiya kakke dēvaruseṭṭige bhāge voṁdu 1 vikrāṁtaseṭṭiya baḷiya jaṁtri malyaṇnaseṭṭigū bhāgyaṇaseṭṭiya baḷiya seṭṭimaiṁdise
ṭṭigū bhāge Oṁdu 1 bhāgyaṇnaseṭṭiya baḷiya kuḍelu Uttamaseṭṭiya Aḷiyaṁdiru seṁtaṇi śāṁtiseṭṭi seṁ
taṇi brahmaṇaseṭṭigaḷige bhāge voṁdu 1 bhāgyaṇnaseṭṭiya baḷiya kuduṁbuḷu śāṁtiseṭṭiya Aḷiyaṁdiru se
ṭṭi cyādaṇnaseṭṭi seṭṭidēvaruseṭṭigaḷige bhāge voṁdu 1 Aṁtu bhāge hanneraḍu 12 .
Digital edition of SII 7.206 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
